steps.text: Review ADS Documents reference to extract the specific checklist and structure for ADS standard employment offer letters, including fixed defaults and Pakistan labour law notes
List all required variable fields for this offer (role, candidate name, start date, compensation, reporting line, etc.) and mark missing ones as [BLANK] per instructions
Draft the full ADS standard employment offer letter for a Data Analyst role, applying ADS fixed defaults and Pakistan labour law, with placeholders for unspecified variables
Review the draft against the ADS checklist (structure, mandatory clauses, Pakistan labour law compliance points, and required placeholders) and ensure the attorney-review disclaimer is included
Finalize the polished offer letter text ready for attorney review
